message:
fix(client): guard against stale unilateral render deltas and fix
initial poll timing

Prevent out-of-order render deltas from regressing client-side pane
state by adding seqno-based staleness checks at two levels:

clientpane.rs:
- Check current seqno before processing GetPaneRenderChangesResponse;
  silently drop deltas with a seqno older than the last applied
- Only update mouse_grabbed state if apply_changes_to_surface returns
  true (delta was actually applied)

renderable.rs:
- apply_changes_to_surface now returns bool indicating whether the
  delta was applied
- Add should_apply_unilateral_delta() predicate: delta.seqno must be
  >= current seqno to be applied; stale deltas are logged and skipped
- Fix initial_last_poll: subtract BASE_POLL_INTERVAL from now so the
  first poll fires immediately rather than waiting one interval
- Reformat import ordering (alphabetical)
- Add tests: initial_last_poll_allows_immediate_first_poll,
  unilateral_deltas_must_not_rewind_seqno

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
